case_title: DAVID WISHART VS. CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-16-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-20-2012 ($60.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADDEN, SUSAN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WISHART, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE $2,612.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,682.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 8/17/11 TO CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-14-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2012 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JAN-30-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE DEFENDANT(JD) WILL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $200.00 PER MONTH, STARTING NOVEMBER 1, 2011. IF NO APPEARANCE ON JANUARY 30, 2012, CONTINUE IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS FOR A TOTAL OF 14 MONTHS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-01-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PER PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT MADE ONE PAYMENT FOR $200.00 AND A PAYMENT OF $200.00 BY CHECK BOUNCED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR--FULLY SATISFIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. BENCH LETTER RECALLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
